== Description ==
[[File:Blood_Sea2.png|thumb|''An image of Level 657'' |300x300px]]
Level 657 is a large, expansive deep red ocean, mostly devoid of any resources. The sky of the level is a dark red color, and is always nighttime, with a large, blood moon casting a dim light over the level. The ocean itself is a deep reddish hue, and always stays at around 27 degrees Celsius, or 81 degrees Fahrenheit. The depth of the ocean is unknown, and contains many aquatic entities. The 'water' in the ocean is NOT blood, liquid pain, nor any other known liquid from the Backrooms. The 'water' is safe to drink, but it is saltwater, and may contain the '''Mycobacterium Marinum Sanguinis'''. 

Level 657 is Euclidian, very stable and has very few Hostile entities. The size of the level is unknown, but it is known that the level is not infinite. It is mostly empty ocean, except for some islands scattered about, and the marine life that resides in the ocean. Such entities includes; Blood-fish, Sea Moths, [[Entity 117|Splinter Jellyfish]] and many other Undocumented marine creatures. 

The level mostly contains sandbanks, protruding rocks and small islands devoid of any resources or life. There are also a few larger islands in the vast ocean, each with their own unique structure upon it. The larger islands are commonly referred to as Major Islands, and only three have currently been discovered, each nicknamed “The Red Dock”, “The Forgotten Fort” and “The Old Lighthouse”. These Islands hold many resources, such as food, water, plants and even [[Object 1|almond water]], and are all safe spaces, with no entities.

== Entities ==

=== Blood Fish ===
Blood Fish are non-dangerous, aquatic fish-like entities native to level 657. They are long, red and fast and resemble Salmon, but are redder, faster, longer and heavier. They are edible, and reportedly also taste like Salmon. Blood Fish have a light red underbelly, and a dark red back, with eight dark-red fins. Blood Fish have light red eyes, grow to around 140 centimeters, and can reach a maximum length of 180 centimeters, and can weigh up to 62 kilograms. They also behave similarly to Salmon.

=== Sea Moth ===
Sea Moths are a type of aquatic, Stingray entity native to level 657. Sea Moths are large carnivores, primarily hunting Blood Fish. It is recommended that you do not attempt to eat a Sea Moth, due to the venom they contain. Sea Moths have a white underbelly, and a dark red back, are shaped like moths and carry a dangerous venom. They carry a highly dangerous venom that is produced and stored in their spinal columns, and is able to knock a fully grown adult male unconscious. 

=== Mycobacterium Marinum Sanguinis ===
'''Mycobacterium Marinum Sanguinis (MMS)''' is a slow growing saltwater variant of the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mycobacterium_marinum '''Mycobacterium Marinum'''] Bacteria, native to Level 657. MMS thrives in temperatures of 30 degrees Celcius, or 86 degrees Fahrenheit, and causes tuberculosis-like infections in aquatic entities, minor skin lesions in humans, and behaves like the regular Mycobacterium Marinum. Not much besides that is known about MMS''.'' The bacteria was discovered by ''John S. Walker'' on May 24th, 2026, after he accidentally ate an infected blood fish, got skin lesions, and decided to find out what caused it. Contrary to what it's name might suggest, ''Mycobacterium Marinum Sanguinis'' is completely unrelated to the [[Sanguine Festivus|'''Sanguine Festivus Virus''']].

== Locations ==

=== Ocean ===
The ocean in level 657 is large, red and mostly empty, besides for a few sandbanks, rocks and islands. There are also boats that can be found floating on the waters on level 657, devoid of fuel, but containing food and water. It is easy to float on the water, as it bears a lot of salt.

==== Underwater ====
The underwater is deep, expansive and contains coral reefs, marine entities, vegetation, rocks and ship wrecks. The coral is mostly red and black, and is home to many undocumented entities, in thriving ecosystems. The ship wrecks are of small boats, are usually only half of a boat, and contain no resources that can be scavenged.

===== The Jutland Trench =====
The Jutland Trench is a deep trench in the ocean of level 657. Little is know about the trench, other than it contains undocumented entities, and streches several kilometers deep.

=== Island A: "The Red Docks" ===
Island A, Also known as "The Red Docks" is the largest of the islands. On the island there is a small, seemingly empty town, on the coast of the island. The town has a decently large dock area, including several small warehouses, Docked boats and lampposts scattered around. In the town, there are houses, restaurants and shops, in great condition, but all of them are empty.

==== The Town ====
The town looks like early 20th century fishing town, with a dock, a town hall, a church and several houses, shops and restaurants, in all empty, but in great condition. All the buildings are made out of red bricks or spruce wood, and black tiled roofing. The roads are mostly made out of cobblestone and gravel, besides for the few large roads layered with asphalt. The streets have lamps that glow a bright red, and never turn off.

The church takes the appearance of a 14th century Medieval church, with a tall belltower, red brick walls, and a black tiled roof. The church stands in the middle of the town, and emits a faint blue light from all of its openings. The bells of the church rings once every 16 hours, and the church itself looks safe, and draws wanderers to enter it.

<u>D̸̨͔̠̝̺͙̯̮͖͍̮͗́̄̈́́̓̔͆͂͘͝ͅỌ̷͕̼͉͎̣̥̯̱̟̗̞̈́͜ ̵̧̖̺̖̭̎̏̆̃̇͊̑̆̌̆̈́̕N̸̢̧͙̠̠͎̥̝͓͐͆̕ ̴̲͖̗̟̥̥̲̾̍̆͒͊̾͘͘̚͜͝ͅƠ̵͔̣͂̓̿̽ͅT̴̪̥͕͇́ ̵̯̙̹͇̤̦̤̜̹̫̬̟̑̏͑̀G̸͍̣͙͊̒̈́O̴̻̜͙̫̪̬̟̝̭͉̪̥̭̾̋̓̐ ̸̨͠I̸̫̹͕̩͚̞͊̉̿͂́̊̎́͂͝͠N̴̨͙͚͉̮̜̖̝͙͆͗̌̊̅̏̏́̕͝͝T̴̙͚̺̒O̴̧̢̡͖̣̯͉̥̻̙̤͈͂̔̌̎̇̒͒̕͝ ̸̂̓͂̒̈́͋̃̈͜T̶̬̙̗̦̖̩̣͚̮̱̿͆ ̵̟̻̝͎͎̺̔̓̓̈́̌̆H̸͇͕͐͗̒̀̉Ë̵̯̻̦̠̺͎̣̳̥̋̉̓̂̈͐̿͒͒͜͝ͅͅ ̷̟̼̖̰͋̒̈́͒̐̈́̒̆̋͘͠C̵̣̱̞̍́̄́̿̄͋̋H̵̬̰͉̎ ̶̣͐̽̎̏Ư̶͈̦͈̭͙͛͜͝ͅŔ̸̠̠͈̩̜̟̱̾̾̊̈̆͋̉̒̚͝ͅÇ̸͕̳͕͇̼͔͗̇̽̀͋͗̐̚Ḫ̵̡̻̺̫̽̀̈́!.̴̛̣͍̹̊͂̿̈́</u>

The town hall looks like an 19th century building, with a small clock tower, black tiled roof and spruce walls. The town hall stands in the middle of the town, near the church, and is seemingly inactive. When entering the town hall, there is a reception, with a desk in the middle, and several sofas to sit down in. going past the reception, there is a hallway leading to some offices, and a staircase in the middle. the staircase leads to a similar looking second floor with more offices.  

Every building has its lights turned off. and when the lights are turned they glow a bright red, similar to the lampposts.  

==== The Docks ====
The docks are in medium size, have several docks and a few piers, with boats docked at some of the docks, as well as three warehouses spread across the dock. There are also lampposts just like from within the city, glowing a bright red. The boats can be accessed, but have no fuel or oars. 

=== Island B: "The Forgotten Fort" ===
Island B, Also known as "The Forgotten Fort", is the second largest of the islands, featuring a Small 18th century fort, with cannons and a tower. The fort is made out of stone bricks, and has a red banner waving at the top of the tower. Inside the fort, there is a barracks, an empty armory, an storage room, a dining room, a kitchen and a game room. Inside the kitchen, there is almond water, as well as stale bread. The rest of the island is empty besides a small field of grass.

=== Island C: "The Old Lighthouse" ===
[[File:RedLighthouse1.webp|thumb|212x212px|An Image of the lighthouse on island C]]
Island C, also known as "The Old Lighthouse", is the smallest of the islands, and has a small field and a lighthouse at the edge. The lighthouse is old, and around 20 meters tall, shining two beams of bright red light. Near the lighthouse, there is a small cabin, with a kitchen, a bedroom, and a living room. The kitchen has Bread, Cheese and Almond Water. The field is made out of grass, and is besides that empty.

== Colonies and Outposts ==
There are no known colonies or outposts in level 657.

== Entrances and Exits ==

=== Entrances ===

* Traveling far enough in [[level 7]], the level might transition into level 657.
* Traveling far enough in [[level 468]], the level might transition into level 657.
* Touching a small red piece of coral in any level will teleport one into level 657.

=== Exits ===

* Traveling far enough in level 657, it will transition into [[level 7]] or [[level 468]].
* ████████ ███ ██████ ██ ██████ █ ████ ████ ██ ██████ █████.
* Falling asleep or passing out in the waters of level 657 might take you to [Insert Level Here]
